TRIAL ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 05

#5 D. WICK, JUDGE; B. FIELDS, CSR; G. ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT AND IN PRO PER. BOTH WAIVE OPENING STATEMENTS. ORAL EVIDENCE PRESENTED. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH PARTIES. JUDGMENT FOR PLTF AND AGAINST DEFT FOR THE RESITUTION AND POSSESSION OF PREMISES AT 359 VICTORIA SF, NO COSTS. COURT ADJOURNS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JONES, CARLOS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 359 VICTORIA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA., LEASE FORFEITED, NO COSTS.
